title: HTTP Caching, Freshness, Validators, Vary, and Invalidation · Browser and Node Client Systems · Compiler Case: Vary Cache Key
summary: An offline-first dashboard combines browser HTTP caching, a service-worker cache, ETags, Vary, and user-specific responses. Planned artifact: Add and verify the http ts vary cache key increment in a TypeScript 7 standards-based Fetch spec-aware cache decision notebook. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Construct cache keys that respect method, target URI, Vary fields, authorization policy, and representation selection. Demonstrate the result through TypeScript 7 strict types plus WHATWG Fetch Request, Response, Headers, URL, streams, and AbortSignal contracts.

Use ETag and Last-Modified validators with If-None-Match or If-Modified-Since and interpret 304 correctly. Demonstrate the result through TypeScript 7 strict types plus WHATWG Fetch Request, Response, Headers, URL, streams, and AbortSignal contracts.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Fetch and TypeScript Predict Vary Cache Key · Theory Vary Cache Key
steps.instruction:
theory case — TypeScript Fetch evidence model stores a response with max-age=30, ETag "rev-3", Age:3, and Vary: Accept-Language.
